name: @MMInit@4
notes: alloc handle table operator_new(count*0x1C); thread all handles onto free list; GetSystemInfo page size; sets mm_initialized

name: @MMShutdown@0
notes: MMFreeAllId for ids 0..0x12 (19 pools) then free handle array; clears mm_initialized

name: @MMAllocHandle@8
notes: core allocator: MMInternalAlloc(size)+MMUseHandle -> T_HANDLE*; frees block if no free handle

name: ?MMUnmapFile@@YIXPAX00@Z
notes: UnmapViewOfFile + CloseHandle(mapping) + CloseHandle(file)

name: ?MMUseHandle@@YIPAUT_HANDLE@@PAXKGE@Z
notes: pop mm_unused_list; fill data(+8)/len(+C)/flags(+10)/allocId(+12); push onto mm_used_list
type: T_HANDLE * __fastcall MMUseHandle(void *, unsigned long, unsigned short, unsigned char)

name: @MMAllocPtr@8
notes: MMAllocHandle then return handle->data (+8)

name: @MMFreeHandle@4
notes: unmap(if flag 0x4000) or MMInternalFree data; RMNotify if flag 0x0010; unlink used-list; push to free list

name: @MMFreePtr@4
notes: MMPtrToHandle then MMFreeHandle

name: @MMReallocPtr@8
notes: MMPtrToHandle then return handle->data (thin realloc-by-ptr shim)

name: @MMPtrToHandle@4
notes: linear scan mm_used_list for handle whose data(+8)==ptr

name: @MMPushAllocId@4
notes: save mmAllocId onto id save-stack @0x538250 (depth @0x4F3DCC); set new id

name: @MMPopAllocId@0
notes: restore mmAllocId from id save-stack

name: @MMCompactRAM@0
notes: stub -> return 0 (no heap compaction on Win32) — the Mac-heritage purger that would discard purgeable handles and set T_HANDLE flag 0x1000 (purged); its readers (RMFind/RMFindAndLoad/BrushFromIndex/MAPDrawBG free-and-reload on the flag) are dead recovery paths in the shipping build

name: @MMFreeAllId@4
notes: walk mm_used_list; MMFreeHandle every handle whose allocId(+12)==id (group free)

name: @MMHandleLen@4
notes: return handle->len(+C) if data non-null else 0

name: _MMLockE@16
notes: SMS-named; not in inventory; extended-lock variant in the MMLock family (undecompiled)

name: @MMUnlock@4
notes: no-op ret (Win32 memory is fixed)

name: _MMAccessE@12
notes: return handle->data(+8)+offset (0 if handle/data null); THE handle-deref primitive

name: ?MMAreaFree@@YIKXZ
notes: SMS-named; not in inventory; free-area query (returns KA/ulong)

name: _MMByteAt
notes: *(int8*)(base+off)

name: _MMWordAt
notes: *(int16*)(base+off)

name: _MMUWordAt
notes: SMS-named; not in inventory; unsigned 16-bit read primitive

name: _MMLongAt
notes: SMS-named; not in inventory; signed 32-bit read primitive

name: _MMULongAt
notes: *(uint32*)(base+off)

name: _RMInit@0
notes: zero resList[1400] (0x19FA dwords) and resCache[20]; set rmInitialized(@0x50A618)=1

name: _RMShutdown@0
notes: RMFree every live resList slot; zero table; clear rmInitialized

name: _RMLocate@12
notes: register key(uppercased)+flags(+0E)+ptr(+0F) in first free RES_LIST slot; tag allocId(+0D)=mmAllocId

name: ?RMUnlocate@@YGXPAD@Z
notes: RMFind(name) then clear name byte (release the RES_LIST slot)

name: @RMFind@4
notes: uppercase key; check 20-entry LRU resCache then linear-scan resList; refresh timerTicks; purge dead handles (flag&2 && handle+0x11&0x10)

name: RMCacheInsert
notes: insert RES_LIST ptr into resCache evicting the oldest (min timerTicks) slot; stamps timerTicks [FUN_004a6ab0]

name: RMFindAndLoad
notes: core resolve+load+register; name from embedded string "RMFindAndLoad: can't load %s" @0x50A624; SMCallByName <type>_Load; LoadFile; IsDLL/LoadDLL for PE-packaged resources; marks handle flag|0x0010; RMLocate(name,3,h); RMSetup [FUN_004a6b30]

name: _RMAccessHandle@8
notes: RMFindAndLoad then return the raw handle/ptr (+0x0F) WITHOUT dereferencing

name: _RMFree@4
notes: RMFind; if flag bit0 SMCallByName <type>_Free; MMFreePtr or MMFreeHandle by flag bit1; RMUnlocate

name: _RMFreeAllId@4
notes: RMFree every resList entry whose allocId(+0D)==id; brackets with rmNotifyEnabled=0/1

name: @RMNotify@4
notes: callback from MMFreeHandle: find resList entry whose ptr(+0F)==freed handle and invalidate it; gated by rmNotifyEnabled

name: RMSetup
notes: post-load per-type hook: SMCallByName <type>_Setup (string @0x50A654) on the freshly loaded resource [FUN_004a6df0]

name: @RMLegalFilename@4
notes: canonicalize a resource filename in place (IsBadStringPtr len 0xD; collapse to a single '.'); OUT-OF-RANGE claim (sits in terrain span)

name: ?mm_initialized@@3DA
notes: MM one-time init guard (bool); set by MMInit cleared by MMShutdown

name: ?mm_handles@@3PAUT_HANDLE@@A
notes: base of T_HANDLE[count] pool (operator_new'd in MMInit)

name: ?mm_used_list@@3PAUT_HANDLE@@A
notes: head of allocated-handle intrusive list (next@+0 prev@+4)

name: ?mm_unused_list@@3PAUT_HANDLE@@A
notes: head of free-handle intrusive list

name: mmAllocIdSp
notes: depth/index of the alloc-id save-stack (@0x538250) for MMPushAllocId/MMPopAllocId [was DAT_004f3dcc]

name: ?resList@@3PAURES_LIST@@A
notes: RES_LIST[1400] resource registry spanning 0x503E30..0x50A618 (1400*0x13=0x67E8)
